base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of particles_effects — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1988 super mario bros 3. All VFX — poof-clouds, coin-sparkles, enemy-stomp flat, brick-shatter, fireball-explosion, star-sparkle, P-meter-flash. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: All VFX — poof-clouds, coin-sparkles, enemy-stomp flat, brick-shatter, fireball-explosion, star-sparkle, P-meter-flash
